reviews.review_title: Great game but it mostly kicks you out..
reviews.review_description:
THE ONLY REASON WHY it's a 4 star right now is because it kicks you out
____________________________________________



-Note for everyone that reads this rating/review

(everything in this rating is just my opinion,) EXCEPT for the part that I said the game kicks you out.
_____________________________________________


(TO THE DEVS THAT CREATED THIS GAME!)


JUST PLS AND I MEAN PLS FIX THIS GLITCH

AND I KNOW I ALREADY SAID THIS BUT I'LL SAY IT AGAIN, PLS I'M BEGGING YOU, BECAUSE THIS USED TO BE MY FAVORITE GAME UNTIL IT STARTED KICKING PEOPLE.......

Unique gameplay but does not meet the expectations. Compared to the first, there is more freedom with the spells and more challenging opponents. However, the mechanics are clunky, and the graphics are poor. Movement and physics are not optimal and the gestures for the spells do not always work. 

The story is not very clear, just going forward without any clues and gets quite repetitive and boring as there are always the same opponents over and over again. There is a base (arbor) but we never get to do anything and we don't know the reason (the voice says that we will explore later but we never do, is the game unfinished?). 

Compared to the first, there are no stages nor points which is good but there are no upgrades or healing potions. The game lasts longer and we are almost surprised when it ends as it's quite sudden. When you finish you get a New game+ option so you keep your spells and opponents are harder but the whole experience doesn't make me want to replay. The multiplayer option seems nice but I didn't find any lobby so maybe there's no community.

I think that if the devs are willing to remaster it (story, graphics, mechanics) and develop it (open world, pvp mode), it could easily be among the top 10 best games.
So for full price, I don't really recommend it. I guess we'll have to wait for a better sorcery game.

I absolutely love the previous game! It's one of my favorite VR games so far! The controls were very accurate and comfortable once I got used to them. But this one? Nope! It doesn't feel like the last game at all! The controls are terribly frustrating to the point of making me not want to play it at all. The gestures just seem to summon random spells. I have video of performing the same gesture several times in a row and getting a different spell every time and sometimes nothing at all. With the intensity of combat in this game, those controls need to be precise. When I need to summon a shield, it needs to work the first time because that can mean the difference between life and death in an instant. But it only works right half the time. 

Also, if you get too close to walls and certain environmental objects, suddenly everything goes black and you can't see a thing. You have to move around and hope you don't get hit several times before you can see again only to summon a fireball when you need a shield or summon 2 shields instead of the ice bow. 
This game sucks bad! Fix the controls!
There are so many enimes coming and attacking and pepole don’t join so you get no help and I swear the enemies do way more damage

what is up with the terrible "gesture commands" i have to memorize 20 different combos to use the different spells and half the time they don't even come out when you actually do the gesture. don't try and fix whats not broken, picking spells from a menu and then casting them would've worked just fine.
You are tricking buyers by saying the game has Russian language support, but it actually doesn't.
title

This game is SUPER fun in my opinion, has a great story and some annoying enemies. at first i had doubts about this game only because when i started it, i clicked my save and it sent me back to the menu over and over again but besides that problem i havent had any bugs happen to me. using hand gestures to cast spells makes it feel so realistic and super fun.🤩

A magician who in the first episode is teleport to dozens of meters away, does he need to climb on the mushrooms and strings in a biskin way in the second episode? The graphics were better in the first episode and it is not the one you see in the trailer. I will have played almost for 15 minutes in total (when I arrived at the rope I climb down and turn off the game). I don't like the game. I asked for a refund and the message appears that the refund is not available. Really? This is true magic ..

It’s the best wizard game and it’s one of the first games I ever played I think it’s fun but there is some bugs like if the host leaves in multiplayer the will freez and it takes a while for the game to lt but it is so much fun and I really enjoy playing the game

What can I say, the game is extremely fun. The spell system takes practise but after a while it works perfectly well. It's nice to be able to cast spells along with your friends. The graphics are also really not that bad for a quest.

I really love this game it's fun to play but the spells get annoying to use. For example when I'm trying to use the lighting spell instead of lighting I get two fireballs ( same for the shield I get fireballs instead of shield ) so I was thinking if you make it where you can use your actual hands instead of the controllers ( and make the fireball spell casting ability less sensitive) it could be even more fun. For moving we could swing our arms ( if we swing faster we run faster ) please consider these changes other than that I love the game

reviews.review_title: Just Downloading & The Glitch & Lag Suck
reviews.review_description: UPDATE: STILL NOT WORKING A YEAR & A HALF LATER. What Happened To The Updates Fixing The Not Loading Issue??? Just Purchased This Yesterday And The Game Would Be Amazing If It Didnt Take 5-10 Minutes To Get Into The Game. I’ve Checked My Internet Connection And It Isnt The Internet Connection. It Always Says Optimizing , Wait For The Game To Restart When I Open The App. Then There Will Be Times I’m In The Game & It Will Just Freeze & Will Have To Restart It. There Are Also Times Where I Get Into The Lobby And It Just Kicks Me Out. I Would Love The Game If It Actually Worked Properly. But I Feel As Though I Just Paid $25 For Something That Lags Too Much. T

Update 2. The bugs are fixed and this game is great, the new sky and surroundings in the new updates are insane! I love it!

It's super cool, beautiful and I love the spells
Won’t launch. Keeps saying app will restart for hours. DONT BUY. SCAM!

reviews.review_title: Great game but can use some improvements
reviews.review_description:
I haven’t played the whole thing yet and will update my review when I do. So far, the spell casting is amazing and feels really good. The combat also feels great. However, the graphics can use some improvement. It is pretty drastically downgraded from the original pcvr version. However, the environments were still nice to look at for a quest game and it didn’t hinder from the immersion or fun of the game. The game is also a little glitchy at times. For example, there were many times where I simply COULD NOT teleport to a place where I was supposed to be able to go. I was forced to use free movement with thumb stick (really hate doing this). There was another glitch where one of my hands randomly stops being able to cast spells which I know isn’t my controller issue because it works fine on other games. This forced me to restart the game and start all the way back from the previous checkpoint. I will say that the game is still very fun to play but can definitely use some improvements. Great potential. Overall, this game is still one of my favorites!

UPDATE: Finally finished the game. The ending is not the best and I’m confused about the story. It ends very abruptly. Still a very fun game overall. I recommend this game.

BROTHERHOOD UPDATE: The new brotherhood update is a BLAST! I love the creative variety of missions and playing with two other friends is AMAZING! The three classes, Fire, Ice, and Storm are all unique and insanely fun. It is so stress relieving and satisfying to blast enemies using various spells. I did encounter some glitches, including a few times my friends randomly disconnected and I had to recreate the room, leading to some frustration. However overall, the long wait for the update did not disappoint! One of the best multiplayer games!

developer_response.body:
Hi Timpooh,

Thank you so much for the detailed review and for sticking with the game through to the end, and into Brotherhood! We're actively working on improvements and fixes, and your input helps us a lot, hopefully we will have new things coming really soon! Thanks again for the support! :)

reviews.review_description: Brotherhood is the best! Can’t wait to play with my brother (I let him be storm), the spell casting is great, textures could use some work, but overall, great game.

I really like this wizardy game and have been playing it for wuite a while off and on. Unfortunately when the brotherhood aspect was added the game became very glitchy and shuts down frequently. I run it on a Q3 and i look forward to the bugs being fixed so i can go back to enjoyng it.

developer_response.body:
Hi Matts13!

Thank you for your kind words and for sticking with the game! We're sorry to hear about the issues you've experienced; we're actively working on fixes and improvements, and we hope to have you back enjoying the game smoothly very soon. Thanks again for your support!

reviews.review_description: The game is amazing but it’s need a update

We love playing this game. It just sucks that in co op it doesn’t have more worlds to go to, you just beat Abigail over and over and it gets kind of boring after a while. I wish they would add more words and upgrade some things. Really be cool if co op could play the campaign together.

developer_response.body:
Hi ShadowKakashi35,

Thanks for leaving a positive review! Congrats on beating Abigail! We've got some new things planned so we hope you can stick around until the new update drops :) Cheers!

reviews.review_description: I've been playing this game for weeks and I do like it but the single player is too hard. Every enemy attack slows your character down to a snails pace. The hordes of enemies are too large and this doesn't seem to be a problem in other versions of the game. I'm only playing on adventure difficulty it shouldn't be this hard.

developer_response.body:
Hi QuietMystery,

Thank you for leaving a review! We're sorry you are not having fun with the Adventure difficulty, we have taken notes and we will discuss ways to make things more fun in this difficulty setting for you and other players. Thank you!

reviews.review_description: My wife, and brother along with my self have been playing the wizards brotherhood dark times. For a week, while we do love the game. It promises a co-op campaign and we have yet to see the ability to play that. We’ve also defeated the witch in the primeweld trails several times and still have not let us progress. We’ve been trapped on the same beginner map and wonder is there something we are missing as to why we can not progress even after defeating the witch, so what do we do?

The combat and spells and abilitys are fantastic. I absolutely love making walls of ice.
But the game is a bit dated, so I wish they would take all the positive things of this game and make a sequel. That would be amazing.
The only downside is, I’m not too crazy about the hard-core multiplayer system of if you’re going up against an enemy that shares the same element as you all you can do is the force push away a.k.a. very little damage and makes it a bit frustrating

developer_response.body:
Hi tyrankoos,

Thanks for taking the time to leave a review and for leaving your feedback - we'll pass it to the team. Glad you are enjoying the game! :)

reviews.review_title: Game does not launch on Q3.
reviews.review_description: Game gets stuck on "optimization" at the start screen and never restarts as stated on Quest 3. Multiple redownloads and restarts do not fix this.    EDIT: on a 4th attempt I let the headset sit for 3 hours on the optimization screen. It worked this time. So far it's interesting, I don't see much change from the original but graphics are improved. I will update after more gameplay.

developer_response.body:
Hi Shogunmn,

Thanks for leaving a review! Glad you got the game to run; thanks for leaving your feedback as well, we will look into this optimization screen, hopefully we will be able to solve it with an upcoming patch. Have fun! Cheers!

reviews.review_description: When you reach lightning level 36 and you get thors hammer its way to weak for max level they can only one shot the weakest enemies fix it the level 9 fire spear is better than this max level item LEVEL IT UP MAKE IT ONE SHOT EVERYTHING EXCEPT BIG BOSSES LIKE OGRES TROLLS WITH SHIELDS AND THOSE lEVITATING ELEMENT WRAITH'S

developer_response.body:
Hi Memetastic75,

Thanks for playing and sharing your feedback! We're glad you're enjoying the game!

We hear you on Thor's Hammer and we'll review its balance, and consider making it more impactful in a future update, we hope you can still enjoy the game before that happens.

Thanks for helping us improve, and happy spellcasting! :)

reviews.review_title: I want my money I want my money back
reviews.review_description: Graphics are bad. Game keeps glitching in every time I try to login. We will take around an hour don’t get the game, ￼￼￼

developer_response.body:
Hi EdgyMacaw1781,

Thanks for leaving a review! We're sorry you are not satisfied with our game, if you are certain you don't want to continue on playing, please reach out to Meta's support and they should be able to issue a refund for you. Thank you for giving our game a try!

reviews.review_title: Needs work for Meta Quest users
reviews.review_description: This game is great and can be fun at times, it has a lot of bugs, and can be very unenjoyable at times like when the ice demon or whatever it is traps you and you can’t do anything. And also the power where you summon a sheiks hasn’t been fixed and sometimes it summons fire ball, especially at the worst times. Hopefully it all gets improved upon soon, it has great potential, but could be better.

Great game, ambiance super, but becomes too difficult with a large number of attackers to kill, Impossible to go further than the ice cave, unable to kill the witch, after multiple attempts, I no longer play 😕

I’ve been looking for a magic game in VR and this is perfect. I just wish I could find a discord or groups to join so I can find people to play with. I don’t have any VR friends with the game and there are never any open lobbies to join when I get on.

developer_response.body:
Hey Krimson_NightFyre,

Thank you for leaving a positive review! We have a community on our Discord channel: https://discord.com/invite/becomeawizard feel free to join and say hi! :) Cheers!

reviews.review_description: This game is sooo amazing graphics and the ability and the storyline by itself is just so creative and amazing 5 star byyy far for me

developer_response.body:
Hi Luke.36127!

Thanks for the kind words, we really appreciate it! Have fun in the game! Cheers! :)

reviews.review_description: Too many bugs

developer_response.body:
Hi Shootermcgavinport,

Thanks for leaving a review! We're sorry that you had this experience - we are constantly trying to improve our game and we hope you will give our game another shot in the future when new updates will drop that will enhance the experience. Thank you!

reviews.review_description:
I bought this a long time ago. After an update, it never worked again. 
I've tried installing and everything I could think of.

developer_response.body:
Hi Qwaz,

We’re sorry to hear you’ve had trouble with the game; please reach out to us on our Discord or send an email to contact@carbonstudio.pl and we’ll work with you to get this resolved as quickly as possible.

Thank you for your patience, and we’ll do our best to get you back into the action! Cheers!

reviews.review_description: I got this game a couple days ago and I am not regretting it. This game is so fun and there’s so many different elements you can use like the fireball the shards the shield, the ice savers in the ice arrow the electricity element. It’s just so much fun not to mention the electricity fireball and the shield have like a special for them.

developer_response.body:
Hi Fiizy_fan,

Thanks for leaving a positive review and it makes us really happy you are enjoying the elements! Have fun! Cheers! :)

reviews.review_description: First of all I’d like to da I love this game and it’s my favorite game in VR. But recently I maxed out my lightning wizard and I got the lightning hammer which I had been really excited for but when I got it to be honest it was just too weak to be worth the grind. So I have come here to ask for a buff on the hammer because it can’t even one shot a unlit so I beg you to buff the hammer so that it may become a spell that can be a well a good so

developer_response.body:
Hi Merlin.08!

Thank you for the kind words, it really means a lot to us :) 

Your feedback about the Hammer's power and the grind to unlock it is noted, and we’ll review its balance to make it more rewarding and impactful in a future update.

Thanks again for your support! Happy spellcasting! :)

reviews.review_description:
I'm grateful for the sentiment of a kind friend whom gifted this to me. But I advise others thinking of purchasing/gifting this to reconsider, esp if seeking enjoyment. You can find 2+ great games for far less. The story, concept, and ideas are great. The execution & experience is a huge fail. While I'd🧡 to recommend & give 5⭐, at this time it's impossible. Why?⬇️

·REITERATING ALL THE SAME neg. points in reviews(long loading, glitches, tracking, ineffectiveness of weaponry, movements, etc)

·I WOULD LOVE to be able to do a campaign to better grasp play. Campaign is useless once u reach the cave and have to teleport up. The "up" is not reachable. I've tried NUMEROUS times via story & adventure mode, and on 2 different headsets. Made various adjustments to no avail.

·As a new player the game doesn't have a fair or gentle enemy introduction. Its a full out UNfair &UNbalanced onslaught. If the system isn't balancing (enemy count) : (player skill level) then player should be able to select skill mode. 2 beginners trying to think quick enough to recall weapon mechanics w/ 8+ enemies stampeding towards them is frustrating & highly discouraging.

·Also, several reviews that contain negative feedback often refer the writer to leave the feedback on their Discord. This is seemingly auto reply needs deleted. Not everybody uses Discord. The issues just need to be noted regardless of where it is highlighted, and deal with it accordingly. The consumer isn't responsible for separating company "memos" and if that's the rule of thumb you all are abiding by, how will the developers know what needs to be tweaked or worked on? No wonder the negative reviews are still coming in.

developer_response.body:
Hi Nurseratchet101!

Thank you for your detailed feedback. We’re sorry to hear that your experience didn’t meet expectations, and we truly appreciate the time you’ve taken to share specific concerns. Feedback like this helps us improve!

We’re actively working on addressing the key issues you have mentioned, however, we do not have an ETA when we will be able to release a patch, unfortunately, as things require sufficient testing.

Regarding feedback channels, we’re sorry if Discord felt like the only option - we use Discord with the community as it is the fastest way to solve issues which worked well in the past. Please rest assured, all feedback, wherever it’s shared, is taken seriously and passed to the team.

Thanks again for your input, and we hope we can improve the game to earn your recommendation in the future. Cheers! :)

reviews.review_description: This game is the most fun game ever. The graphics are really good. The story mode is a ton of fun and lasts a pretty good time for a VR game. You can play a co op mode with random people or your friends. When you are getting into the game it might take a couple of minutes but give it time because it will load after a while.

developer_response.body:
Hi PetesDragon3,

Thank you for leaving such a positive review! We're glad you are enjoying the game! Cheers! :)

reviews.review_description: This is probably one of the best games I've played I've seen so many reviews and so much stuff that says that it's bad but it's the complete opposite of it it's amazing I love that it's not no one click b***s*** it's only kind of but you will have to wave your hands in specific ways or do specific things to do certain spells it kind of took me a while to do the shield instead of a fireball but that's because I did the wrong gesture but if I said that had no flaws I would be lying or , wouldn't the only problem I have with it is the graphics I see so many people shout out or not but wolf in vr had such good graphics and whenever I played it had a low but good graphics it wasn't horrible nor was it like his or maybe I'm just really dumb it's in graphic settings the time I'm writing this the Oculus I cannot use but yeah definitely recommend please play it super good

developer_response.body:
Hi lvl1Forgegoblin!

Wow, thank you for the amazing review! We're thrilled you’re enjoying the game and diving into the spellcasting mechanics :)

We appreciate your feedback on the graphics, and we'll take a closer look to see where improvements can be made!

Thanks for your recommendation and kind words - happy spellcasting! :)

reviews.review_title: All ive seen are bugs from start to end
reviews.review_description: It would be a nice game if it works properly. But you can't play 5 min without a bug. It pisses me off. I tried to uninstall ans install again but didn't work so it's kind of a wast of time and money. In the other hand I'd give a 4 or 5 stars if the bugs get fixed and hand tracking gets a bit more accurate ( 80% of the time you cant get the "weapon" you want or it gets something else) as the idea and the game itself is pretty cool.

reviews.review_title: Why not great graphics on quest 3 ??
reviews.review_description:
I have played this game on quest three for a few months and I have noticed that there are a tiny details like conjuring a fireball it does not have great graphics compared to PCVR and quest two.
￼

developer_response.body:
Hey Suzelowe,

Thanks for your feedback! While we strive to provide the best experience on all platforms, there can be differences in graphics quality due to hardware capabilities and optimizations. That said, we’re constantly working to improve the game, and we'll see if there's anything we can do to enhance the fireball to make it more appealing. 

We appreciate your input! Cheers!

reviews.review_description: It is a great I enjoy it but a problem became glaringly clear that fireballs broad gesture will often overwrite the spell I try to cast. Also why does respawn feel painfully long. I might just be bad at this game but this was extremely frustrating.

The story mode is as fun as going on a roller coaster. My favorite vr game. All the spells are really good. And the graphics are inasane . I recommend getting this game. It does take long to load but it’s worth it.

developer_response.body:
Hi Foxymav,

Thank you for leaving such a positive review for our game! We really appreciate it and we're glad you are having fun in Meliora! :) Cheers!

reviews.review_description: The main campaign of the game is fantastic and fun, and deserves 5 stars unfortunately olot of players are having the severe problem of having their stats in the pineweld trials multi-player mode Including me!! what the crap  this BS!!!!

reviews.review_title: Very very difficult, the mechanics seem:
reviews.review_description:
[SAVE YOUR MONEY]
- Jenky, lacking power, the shields don't prevent ANY damage EVEN WHEN FULLY BLOCKING! Is not playable unless you operate in a very very fast paced intense VR veteran type environment or enjoy games like HellSweeper VR without some of the other enjoyment like your weapons being ACTUALLY EFFECTIVE. 
- They have varying types of attacks for different enemies the problem is they're ALL attacking you at once, no ability to time attacks or prep attacks for the varying enemies, seemingly your weapons have almost no effect but the enemy hits you a couple times and you're frozen in place and dead.

- Not even worth it at a lower or discount price, COULDNT EVEN RETURN WHEN TRYING TO PLAY ON EASIEST MODE, IF ONLY TO LEARN THE MECHANICS...
But the game seems to go 100mph but the only ppl they didn't tell this to was the gameplay

This game has gotten a number of updates to increase value. The spell casting physicality is more imaginative compared to, say, blade & sorcery. Coop is fun, but any way to do full campaign mode coop? Wave shooters are alright but I need narrative pull and would like to do that with my friend. 

As feedback, the climbing mechanic is a little janky. How the grip animation attaches to whatever you're holding could be improved and made less immersion-breaking. Thanks for continuing to update the game!

Had a ton of fun playing through adventure and campaign plus. When the update for campaign plus came my completed adventure file was deleted for some reason... I looked the other way because I had a ton of fun and I could run through the adventure campaign pretty quick. This last update you guys made deleted my (insert frustrated profanity) file again... Come on.. this game has some replayability but not enough to run through adventure then campaign+ again. Only to play the same campaign but with more difficulty... Don't get me wrong this game is amazing and I want to support both it and future games, but this is just rediculous... Maybe just allow access to all difficulties? Something must be done because I see this isn't the only review that has had this issue. Until then I am only giving it 1 star and likely won't play this game anymore... How unfortunate.

reviews.review_title: Promising but let down but bugs
reviews.review_description:
Fun game but let down by game breaking bugs and shocking graphics. 

I mean I know this is the oculus quest but similar games look so much better

The spell features are great but the battles are like fighting cardboard cutouts. 

Not impressed
It was ok The game play was amazing but the end was bad I expect more and the graphics were not that good but still I liked it

I have been playing this game as stroy mode. I am currently using oculus quest2 and not use the PC. I'm only playing this game using oculus quest2. In the game, I can use a lot of magics such as fireball, like thunderstorm, etc. If you want to experience fantastic world as wizard, I stronly recommend this game. I'm satisfying current graphic of this game because it is VR version not 2D version. VR version needs a lot of data and time for developing. With current technology, in my opinion, this game is very excellent. I'm falling with this game nowdays. Really!!!
In my opinion, the person who likes the roleplaying game will like this game very well. I hope this review will be helpful for wanting to play this game. And I hope that I can see the specific and fantastic game in the future as VR game version about Diablo or Lineage. These game is just example. Anyway, after doing this game, I expect that it will appear in near future.

Dear developer of this game, 
In South-Korea, there is a lot of roleplaying games such as Lineage, Odin, etc. I think Korean likes to play this kind of games. Therefore, If you add the Korean language to this game, I think a lot of Korean people who use the oculus quest2 will buy this and play it. If you would like to sell a lot of users in Korea who use the oculus quest2, I'm stronly recommend to add Korean language to this game for enjoying it. 
Thank you very much for reading my review until now.

I can't believe The Wizards Dark Times got released in this condition. It's bad enough it's a super empty game with little to do except spam spells at easy enemies. But it is riddled with glitches and black screens when you get too close to walls. It really seems like it wasn't tested at all. It definitely needs a better progression system. Stats or upgrade abilities or crafting, something. You start with over half the spells and they are mostly underwhelming. They need to be more unique in when they need to be used. The areas are large and empty. This game has endless potential but should not have been released this empty.
Has no direction of where to go or what to do makes u dizzy amd sick makes no sense at all

developer_response.body:
Hello, PrudenceF

We're sorry you found our game confusing - we understand that getting started with new titles can be a bit complicated sometimes. To make it easier to navigate the in-game world, we recommend watching the Walkthrough videos available on the web. We believe that after you complete the first stages, the rest of the game will go smoothly and hassle-free.

reviews.review_description: This is a great game I like everything I think you should make a 3rd game and also add more spells in that because the spells are so cool I wish there was more so please make a 3rd game and I’ll get it that’s how good the is

Overall very fun, story line was kind of meh, but lots of spells to learn and cast which I loved. One spell in particular is pretty much the most OP, but luckily don't learn ot til near the end if the adventure. About to embark on the new game + to check out the new combat with all of the spells at my disposal now!

developer_response.body: Hey, VenserTheExiled! Thank you for your review and good luck on your next adventure!

reviews.review_description: One of the Best on VR

Amazing game the hand jesters are immaculate 
￼
This is an amazing game even though I just got my vr like 3 moths ago
This game is really fun to play. Remainds me a bit of The Witcher. The atmosphere is good. Also the feeling of walking is pretty interesting!

reviews.review_title: Just started and I’m enjoying it
reviews.review_description: So far it’s a good game to me

I was not going to dona review but to manybreviews have been ragging on this game and it's unwarrented...its alot of fun thebpitential with coming multi player and more content has me excited....thebgrafix are not state of the art reminds me of late 90s....ignore the haters and go throw some fire balls and cast lighting it's a blast....

I'll give it 3 and that may be generous. The story seems decent, the gameplay mechanic I like. I do not like how glitchy and how bad the graphics are. Not only does it look mediocre, the frame rate issues are insane. unplayable at times. If it ran smoother I could give it a better rating.
Thought it would be fun but got bored almost instantaneously. Needs to be more enjoyable and have more freedom. Very restrictive.

developer_response.body:
Hello, Allhailsilver!

We are sorry that our game does not meet your expectations. Thank you for your feedback - we thoroughly analyze all opinions and always take them as a lesson. Perhaps you will like the second game in the series (The Wizards - Dark Times) more :) it's worth a try!
